channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sanders Bill Would Allow Government to Seize AI Company Stocks
Obama Center Adds Indigenous Land Acknowledgment at Controversial Site
item.description: The Obama Presidential Center includes a permanent land acknowledgment near the museum tower, drawing debate given the site's history.

item.title: Democrat Who Sued to Remove Trump's Name Now Calls Kennedy Center a 'Lifeless Husk'
item.description: Democratic Rep. Joyce Beatty, who sued to remove Trump's name, says the Kennedy Center is violating its agreement by not resuming shows.

item.title: Trump: Iran Deal Is Surrender, Sees Regime Change
item.description: President Donald Trump defended his administration's agreement with Iran, arguing it amounts to an unconditional surrender by Tehran.
